epigraph.text: And you will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.
epigraph.quote: Inference about regression coefficients rests on the same principles as any hypothesis test.

content.text:
We now test hypotheses and construct confidence intervals for 
regression parameters.

items:
**Equal variance (homoscedasticity):** Error variance is 
 constant across $X$

content.title: Standard Error of $\hat{\beta
$t$-Test for Slope
content.content:
To test $H_0: \beta_1 = 0$ (no linear relationship):
\[
 t = \frac{\hat{\beta}_1 - 0}{\SE(\hat{\beta}_1)}
\]
with $df = n - 2$.
content.label: Theorem

content.text:
If we reject $H_0: \beta_1 = 0$, there is evidence of a linear 
relationship between $X$ and $Y$.

content.title: Testing the Slope
content.problem:
From $n = 20$ observations: $\hat{\beta}_1 = 2.4$, $\SE(\hat{\beta}_1) = 0.8$.

Test if there is a relationship at $\alpha = 0.05$.
